calibration_notes: My last 7 intraday predictions were all wrong with 45% confidence - I was too bullish in a high_vol_downtrend regime, overweighting the bullish P/C ratio while ignoring VIX at 26.91. For previously missed tickers: XLE had a data error but my $102.5 target was absurd for a $58 stock - I need to validate current prices. META I called bullish but it fell 0.95% - adjusting to respect mega-cap weakness in risk-off environments.
